payload.review_text: Re-audit iteration 2 of PLAN-AA0. All five iteration-1 findings resolved (S403 CLAUDE.md stale rule via new Step 7; S999 literal README heading; S204 --force reprocess in human verify item; S001 canonical venv in Context; S201 stem-collision in Step 3 docstring). One new non-blocker warning S102: Step 7's CLAUDE.md freshness edit has no automated verify: item — acceptable per plan-safe (each Verification item must be shell-runnable, not each Step). Orchestrator will verify Step 7 landed at outcome-verifying per D4; human windows item also covers it. Step count 7 (< PSZ001 threshold 12). No plan_foundry-boundary violation. Net: sufficient, zero blockers, ready for plan-safety.

triaged_human_items.item: verify: human — drag a real .m4a onto Transcribe.cmd; skip on re-drag; --force reprocess
triaged_human_items.rationale: Drag-drop is a Windows GUI gesture, not automatable on CI. Not a design question.

findings.message: Prior freshness blocker resolved via new Step 7 editing the CLAUDE.md Diarizer-CLI bullet with sentinel-block warning and out-of-repo memory-file flag.
Prior ambiguous README heading resolved; Step 6 now specifies literal ## Just run (drag-and-drop).
Prior --force reprocess gap resolved; human verify item now exercises --force end-to-end.
Stem-based extension-insensitive matching now in docstring.
Step 7's CLAUDE.md freshness edit has no verify:/acceptance: item. Not a blocker; orchestrator will verify at outcome-verifying and human item covers it.
findings.suggested_fix: Optional: add a grep verify for the new CLAUDE.md phrasing.
